design_philosophy.mood: Professional, dense, technical yet elegant. Inspired by 'Ink on Paper' minimalism, optimized for a high-data broadcast control room.
key_principles: The 'Ink on Paper' Rule: Pure white background with pitch black text for maximum WCAG AAA legibility.
Data Density Management: The 'Control Room' grid with sharp 1px borders to separate information without relying on heavy shadows or bloated rounded cards.
Precision Typography: Rejection of generic fonts in favor of highly technical monospace for data, and authoritarian Grotesk for hierarchy.
Red as the Razor: Red (#DC2626) is used strictly for brand CTAs and critical live status indicators, contrasting violently with the monochrome canvas.

headings.usage: H1, H2, Dashboard KPIs, Login Taglines

body.usage: Main UI text, paragraphs, generic tables

mono.usage: IP addresses, bitrates, URLs, tokens, stream keys, map data tooltips

spacing_and_grid.gaps: gap-4 to gap-6 for macro layout, gap-1 for micro elements
spacing_and_grid.padding: p-4 or p-6 for panels, p-2 for table cells
spacing_and_grid.layout_pattern: Technical grid borders: border-collapse on macro layouts where adjacent panels share a single 1px line.

cards.style: Flat, pure white (bg-white) or off-white (bg-zinc-50). border border-zinc-200. rounded-sm (2px). No shadow by default.

buttons.primary: bg-red-600 text-white rounded-sm font-medium tracking-wide hover:bg-red-700 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-300 text-zinc-900 rounded-sm hover:bg-zinc-100

inputs.style: bg-white border border-zinc-300 rounded-sm text-zinc-900 focus:border-red-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-red-500 transition-all font-mono for technical inputs.

pills.live: bg-green-100 text-green-800 border border-green-200 font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest
pills.idle: bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-800 border border-zinc-200 font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest
pills.error: bg-red-100 text-red-800 border border-red-200 font-mono text-xs uppercase tracking-widest

tables.header: bg-zinc-50 border-b border-zinc-200 text-xs font-semibold text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-wider

login_page.layout: Split screen. The left/background is an abstract white architectural geometric image. Right side is pure white containing the login form.
login_page.branding: Cabinet Grotesk H1 for 'amixtv', JetBrains Mono overline for 'GRUPO AMIX HN'. Minimalist input fields with sharp edges.

media_urls.description: Abstract white architectural geometry against a bright blue sky, adding an 'advanced' high-contrast feeling to the login page.

dashboard_kpis.layout: Grid of 4 macro KPI blocks sharing 1px borders (border-r, border-b) seamlessly without margins.
dashboard_kpis.typography: Huge numbers in JetBrains Mono (text-5xl), tracking-tighter. Labels in uppercase IBM Plex Sans.

streams_list.layout: Dense data table maximizing screen real estate.
streams_list.features: Status pills in a dedicated tight column. Mini sparklines for bitrate history directly inside the table row.

stream_detail.components: Top left: HLS preview with black frame (absolute contrast). Right: Real-time bandwidth charts. Bottom: Choropleth world map with monochrome white/gray base and red hot-spots for viewers.

settings_tabs.layout: Vertical sidebar for settings nav (bg-zinc-50) and a wide right pane for forms.
settings_tabs.features: Forms should feel like a technical invoice: organized, bordered sections with monospace helper text.

micro_interactions.hover: Instant or 150ms transition. Elements don't 'float', they light up (borders darken, text gets blacker).
micro_interactions.focus: Aggressive focus rings: ring-2 ring-offset-1 ring-red-500.
micro_interactions.motion: Minimal. No bouncy animations. Snappy and immediate.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case format based on role (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Load these exact CSS variables into frontend/src/index.css. Use Cabinet Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts or a font provider. Apply the 'Control Room' grid rules, keeping spacing dense and edges sharp (radius 0.125rem). Follow the strict testing rules by adding data-testid to every interactive primitive. Share the guideline for .js files not for .tsx files.
